content.summary: Outputs channels with constant values. Useful for parameters, defaults, and static data.

examples.label: Set a named constant value
examples.description: Create a channel named 'speed' with value 2.5.

examples.label: Define two parameter channels
examples.code:
c = op('constant1')
c.par.name0 = 'width'
c.par.value0 = 1920
c.par.name1 = 'height'
c.par.value1 = 1080

examples.label: Read a constant value in a script
